name: JChat Contract - Consultorio (AI Studio Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, REST)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ system_instruction: { parts: [{ text: $json.systemMessage }] }, contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.agentInput }] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json', temperature: 0.4 } }) }}
